title: Cheats Plus - Short Grass
description: Break short grass for dimonds, totems, and exp bottles.
body:
Have you ever thought it was to hard to get good gear.  Or wanted good items at the beginning.  In this mod, all you have to do to get good, exquisite loot, is break short grass.  

![A player in Minecraft breaking short grass for Dimonds, Exp Bottles, and Totems of Undying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75b39716244ee60204ebe51dce4d5cb73ce1dcc9.gif)

# What Breaking Grass Gets You

_**Totems of undying, dimonds, and Experiance Bottles**_
